name: Crab and Corn Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in margarine until soft.
2. Add flour and cook gently for 1 minute, then remove from heat.
3. Gradually add milk. Return to heat and cook until thickened.
4. Stir in diced potatoes, celery, green pepper, and cream. Simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Stir in crabmeat and corn. Heat through.
